hub.title: Plan of Action Hub
hub.subtitle: Every live interview, one plan each, built before the call

plans.interviewLabel: Thu Jul 23, 2026 · 12:00–1:00 PM EDT · Google Meet
plans.who: Chris Bross (Partner/COO) · Thomas Heed (Co-Founder/President) · Collin (role TBC)
plans.thesis: Indiana's insurance and home-services M&A wave manufactures EverEffect's exact problem on a predictable clock — a merger fragments digital presence, and that is a Local SEO, GBP and web-design engagement arriving on a known date.

plans.who: Hayley (HR) · introduction routed through a mutual contact
plans.thesis: FusionAuth has the product devs want and the competitive wedge that closes. What is missing is the operating system that turns 20M+ downloads and a freemium base into predictable, qualified pipeline.

plans.pitchDateLabel: Live since Jul 13, 2026 · Growth plan locked Jul 12
plans.who: Angela E. Gerlach, Esq. · Fort Lauderdale, FL
plans.thesis: Site live via GoDaddy passthrough theme. Full audit + 12-month growth plan locked — remaining blockers are logo assets and Cal.com hours, both client-side.

plans.pitchDateLabel: Live since May 21, 2026 · Growth plan locked Jul 12
plans.who: Robert Davis, Esq. · Fort Lauderdale, FL
plans.thesis: Phase 1 live: 10 statute-cited practice areas, static HTML, Netlify + Zapier. GBP video verification is the one call that unblocks the $500 balance and the Phase 2 retainer at once.

plans.pitchDateLabel: Pitch delivered Jul 19, 2026 · Meeting held Jul 20
plans.who: Alexander Karantzalis, Esq. · Echelon Legal, PLLC
plans.thesis: A 4.6-star firm with a 3-page website — the reputation is earned, the platform is not carrying it yet. Real audit, real ranking data, real offer.
